problem_text_cn: 4-23 以圆锥摆摆球为讨论对象，取悬挂点为参考点，验证质点角动量定理。
problem_text_en: 4-23 Taking the bob of a conical pendulum as the object of study and the suspension point as the reference point, verify the angular‑momentum theorem for a particle.
problem_solution_cn:
解 参考图4-18所设参量，据几何关系和圆运动向心力公式，可算得摆球水平圆轨道半径和运动速率分别为

$$ R=l\sin\theta,\quad v=\sqrt{g l \cos\theta}\sin\theta. $$

摆球受拉力$T$和重力$mg$，相对于$O$点力矩为

$$ M = I \times mg;\quad \text{方向：水平切向旋转。} $$

摆球相对于$O$点角动量为

$$ L = I \times m\nu,\quad L = l m v. $$

$L$可分解成竖直向上的分量$L_{1}$与水平旋转的分量$L_{\theta}$，且有

$$ L_{1} = l m v \sin\theta = R m v, $$
$$ L_{\theta} = l m v \cos\theta. $$

竖直方向上便有

$$ M_{\perp} = 0,\quad \frac{dL_{\perp}}{dt} = 0. $$

水平方向上，参考图4-19，在$t \to t+\mathrm{d}t$时间内，有

$$ dL_{\theta}: \begin{cases} \text{方向：水平切向旋转，} \\ \text{大小：} dL_{\theta} = R m g \, dt. \end{cases} $$

$dL$的计算过程如下：

$$ \begin{align*} dL_{y} &= l m v \cos\theta \, d\theta = l m v \cos\theta \, \frac{v}{R} \, dt \\ &= l m \left( \frac{g l}{\cos\theta} \sin^{2}\theta \right) \cos\theta \, \frac{dt}{R} = R m g \, dt, \end{align*} $$

于是，水平方向有

$$ M_{\theta} = M: \begin{cases} \text{方向：水平切向旋转，} \\ \text{大小：} M_{\theta} = R m g. \end{cases} $$

$$ \frac{dL_{y}}{dt}: \begin{cases} \text{方向：水平切向旋转，} \\ \text{大小：} \frac{dL_{y}}{dt} = R m g. \end{cases} $$

与竖直方向联合，便有

$$ M = \frac{dL}{dt}. $$

这就验证了质点角动量定理。
problem_solution_en:
Solution Refer to the parameters shown in Figure 4‑18. From the geometric relations and the centripetal‑force formula for circular motion, the radius of the horizontal circular orbit and the speed of the bob are respectively

$$ R = l \sin\theta,\quad v = \sqrt{g l \cos\theta} \, \sin\theta. $$

The bob is subjected to the tension $T$ and gravity $mg$. The torque about point $O$ is

$$ M = I \times mg;\quad \text{direction: rotating horizontally in the tangential direction.} $$

The angular momentum of the bob relative to point $O$ is

$$ L = I \times m\nu,\quad L = l m v. $$

$L$ can be decomposed into a vertically upward component $L_{1}$ and a horizontal rotational component $L_{\theta}$, with

$$ L_{1} = l m v \sin\theta = R m v, $$
$$ L_{\theta} = l m v \cos\theta. $$

In the vertical direction we have

$$ M_{\perp} = 0,\quad \frac{dL_{\perp}}{dt} = 0. $$

In the horizontal direction, referring to Figure 4‑19, during the time interval $t \to t+\mathrm{d}t$,

$$ dL_{\theta}: \begin{cases} \text{direction: rotating horizontally in the tangential direction,} \\ \text{magnitude: } dL_{\theta} = R m g \, dt. \end{cases} $$

The calculation of $dL$ proceeds as follows:

$$ \begin{align*} dL_{y} &= l m v \cos\theta \, d\theta = l m v \cos\theta \, \frac{v}{R} \, dt \\ &= l m \left( \frac{g l}{\cos\theta} \sin^{2}\theta \right) \cos\theta \, \frac{dt}{R} = R m g \, dt, \end{align*} $$

Hence, in the horizontal direction,

$$ M_{\theta} = M: \begin{cases} \text{direction: rotating horizontally in the tangential direction,} \\ \text{magnitude: } M_{\theta} = R m g. \end{cases} $$

$$ \frac{dL_{y}}{dt}: \begin{cases} \text{direction: rotating horizontally in the tangential direction,} \\ \text{magnitude: } \frac{dL_{y}}{dt} = R m g. \end{cases} $$

Combining the vertical and horizontal directions, we obtain

$$ M = \frac{dL}{dt}. $$

This verifies the angular‑momentum theorem for a particle.
img_cn:
图4-18：圆锥摆示意图，包含悬挂点O、摆线长l、摆球、水平圆轨道半径R、摆线与竖直方向夹角θ。图中标注了摆球所受的力：张力T和重力mg。

 图4-19：水平方向上角动量的微分变化示意图，展示dLθ的方向和大小。图中显示了在时间dt内，由于摆球运动，其水平角动量分量Lθ的微小变化dLθ，方向沿水平切向旋转，大小为Rmg dt。
img_en:
Figure 4‑18: Schematic diagram of a conical pendulum, including the suspension point O, the length l of the string, the bob, the radius R of the horizontal circular orbit, and the angle θ between the string and the vertical. The forces acting on the bob are labeled: tension T and gravity mg.

 Figure 4‑19: Schematic of the differential change of angular momentum in the horizontal direction, showing the direction and magnitude of dLθ. The figure illustrates the infinitesimal change dLθ of the horizontal angular‑momentum component Lθ due to the bob’s motion during time dt; its direction is along the horizontal tangential rotation, and its magnitude is Rmg dt.
problem_answer: 通过计算摆球相对于悬挂点的力矩$M$和角动量$L$，并证明$M = \frac{dL}{dt}$，验证了质点角动量定理。
